name: Warner Music Group Corp.
summary: Warner Music Group Corp. (WMG) is a music entertainment company operating in recorded music and music publishing. It identifies, signs, and retains recording artists and songwriters, monetizes music through streaming, digital distribution, and physical formats, and manages a catalog of recordings and compositions. WMG combats piracy, pursues strategic acquisitions, and distributes music globally through digital music services and other channels.
